description: Our Rust Dashboard deployment script is failing. The build context is too large because .dockerignore is missing 'target/'. Fix the binary path in 'rust_dashboard_app.Dockerfile', ensure 'scripts/deploy.sh' forces no-cache and uses $BASE_DIR as context, and add 'target/' to .dockerignore.
initial_log: ERROR: failed to compute cache key: '/app/target/server/release/dashboard-app': not found

checks.error_msg: ERROR: Docker build using old cache.
ERROR: Target binary target/server/release/dashboard-app not found in builder layer.
ERROR: Build context is massive, caching stalled. Did you ignore target/?
